parts.text:
# Documentation Request

I'd be happy to help you create technical documentation for your project. To provide the most useful documentation, I could use some additional information about what you need documented:

## What type of documentation do you need?
- API reference
- User guide/manual
- Developer documentation
- Installation/setup guide
- Technical specification
- Code comments/inline documentation
- README file
- Other

## Information that would help me create better documentation:
- The purpose and scope of your software/project
- Target audience (developers, end-users, administrators)
- Specific features or components that need documentation
- Any existing documentation that needs updating
- Preferred format (Markdown, HTML, PDF, etc.)
- Examples or code snippets you'd like included

Please provide any details you can, and I'll help create clear, comprehensive documentation tailored to your needs.
